shortDescription.en: Audit your Shopify store for Google Merchant Center Misrepresentation policy violations before your GMC account gets suspended — no API token required
shortDescription.zh: 在 Google Merchant Center 账号被暂停前，提前审计 Shopify 店铺的 GMC 虚假陈述政策风险——无需 API 授权

longDescription.en:
Google Merchant Center suspends Shopify stores for Misrepresentation violations — missing return policies, empty shipping pages, fake urgency, price mismatches, and unverifiable claims. Most merchants only find out after their Shopping ads stop running.

This skill simulates Google's crawler and surfaces every risk before Google does. Phase A audits store identity, policy completeness, pricing integrity, and technical signals. Phase B deep-crawls sampled products, parsing all JSON-LD schema blocks and checking for unsubstantiated claims.

Output: a single HTML report with risk score, prioritized findings, a Manual Checklist (MC-01 to MC-07) for GMC account vs website consistency, official Google Merchant Center policy links, and a staged remediation plan — so you know exactly what to fix before submitting a GMC appeal.
longDescription.zh:
Google Merchant Center 因虚假陈述政策暂停 Shopify 店铺——缺失退货政策、空白运费页面、虚假紧迫感、价格不一致、无法核实的声明。大多数商家只有在购物广告停投后才发现问题。

这个技能模拟 Google 爬虫视角，在 Google 发现之前找出所有风险。A 阶段审计店铺身份、政策完整性、定价和技术信号；B 阶段对采样商品进行深度爬取，解析所有 JSON-LD schema 块并检测未经证实的声明。

输出单文件 HTML 报告，含风险评分、优先级发现、GMC 账号与网站一致性手动核查清单（MC-01 至 MC-07）、官方 Google Merchant Center 政策链接和分阶段修复计划——让你在提交 GMC 申诉前清楚知道需要修复什么。

introduction.en: Your Google Merchant Center account is at risk if your Shopify store has missing policies, price mismatches, fake urgency, or unverifiable claims. Audit every risk in minutes — before Google suspends your account or rejects your appeal.
introduction.zh: 如果你的 Shopify 店铺存在政策缺失、价格不一致、虚假紧迫感或无法核实的声明，你的 Google Merchant Center 账号随时面临暂停风险。几分钟内审计所有风险——在 Google 暂停账号或拒绝申诉之前。

title.zh: 在账号暂停前发现 GMC 违规

description.en: Identifies the exact Misrepresentation policy violations Google flags — missing return policies, empty shipping pages, fake countdown timers, and price inconsistencies — before your Shopping ads go dark.
description.zh: 在购物广告停投前，精准识别 Google 标记的虚假陈述政策违规：缺失退货政策、空白运费页面、虚假倒计时和价格不一致。

title.zh: 店铺 + 商品全面审计

description.en: Phase A audits store identity, policies, pricing, and technical signals. Phase B deep-crawls sampled products with JSON-LD multi-block analysis to catch schema mismatches and unverifiable claims.
description.zh: A 阶段审计店铺身份、政策、定价和技术信号；B 阶段对采样商品进行 JSON-LD 多块深度分析，发现 schema 不一致和无法核实的声明。

title.zh: 可用于申诉的 HTML 报告

description.en: Prioritized findings with evidence, a Manual Checklist for GMC account vs website consistency, official Google Merchant Center policy links, and a staged remediation plan — so you know exactly what to fix before submitting a GMC appeal.
description.zh: 带证据的优先级发现、GMC 账号与网站一致性手动核查清单、官方 Google Merchant Center 政策链接和分阶段修复计划——让你在提交 GMC 申诉前清楚知道需要修复什么。

title.zh: 适用于任何 Shopify 店铺

description.en: Crawls only public pages — no Shopify Admin API token, no app install, no store access needed. Audit your own store or any competitor's live store in minutes.
description.zh: 仅爬取公开页面——无需 Shopify Admin API 授权、无需安装 App、无需店铺访问权限。几分钟内审计自己的店铺或任何竞争对手的在线店铺。
